title: millow' #4407
definition:
Millo = "rampart" or "mound"

 1) a place near Shechem; site unknown
 2) a part of the fortifications of Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Millo = "rampart" or "mound"

 1) a place near Shechem; site unknown
 2) a part of the fortifications of Jerusalem

    NASB:  a place near Shechem, also a citadel in Jer.
